TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Ci Difang == I 1921 a mihecaan ko kasofocan ni Difang a malitengay, a tamdaw cingra, saka i 1938 a mihecaan i, mikapot ciira to Laketun a selal , papidi^ciwen no malitengay cingra. O nian a midi^ciway hananay a tayal i, o tatiyangan no niyaro', matatodongay a sidemak. I 1978 a mihecaan, matayal ci 許常惠singsi a miloing to radiw no Yin-co-min, o papatayraen i Fako kora radiw no Yin-co-min. Toya tayni cingra i Falagaw a mamiloing to radiw no 'Amis i, licayen ningra ci Piya' a malitengay, "cima ko samaradiway namo o Falangaw?" han ningra. "Ci Difang ko samaradi:way niyam." han ni Piya' a malitengay a pacako. Tayra sata ci 許常惠singsi i loma' na Difang a malitengay a mitengil to radiw naira. Toya dadaya, masa'opo ca Difang a malitemgay i papotal no loma', maherek cingra a mipalamal toya 'ongto ningra a mitamako i, misatapang to cangra a romadiw. Radiw sato cangra i, sapa sato koya mitengilay to radiw nangra a lafang, mana makapah a tengilen ko radiw nangra? sato ko hemek nangra, olah sato a miloing to radiw na Difang a malitengay. I 1988 a mihecaan, tahidangen no Fako a kitakit cingra a talaFako a romadaiw. Romadiw cangra i Fako, "onini makapa:hay ko ngiha a tamdaw, naniTaywanay, ci Difang ko ngangan nira." sato ko pipakimaday no sinpon. Itiyato a 'aloman ko mafana'ay to Taywan hananay a kitakit. I 1993 a mihecaan, patekoen na Enigma hananay a romadiway koya niradiwan ni Difang a malitengay i "Return-To Innocence" CD. Wata ko lietanan noya CD, adihay ko payso na Enigma hananay a romadiway. Nikawrira awaay ko mafana'ay cima koya makapahay a ngiha a tamdaw. Tangasa i 1996 a mihecaan i, paka'ayawen no Yatelanta ontokay koya "eturn-To Innocence" a radiw a patengil ko 'alomanay, ta itiya a kalasasowalen no pakatengilay, mana o niradiwan ni Difang kora radiw i, nawiro caka singangan i CD? sato masadak ko hatiniay a sowal. Itiyato mafana' ko 'alomanay ci Difang a malitengay, i Falangaw ko loma' ningra, o 'Amis cingra. '〝'Afasan na Enigma hananay a romadiway ko radiw ni Difang, patikolen ci Difangan ko nidemakan nira.〞sato ko masadakay a sowal. 2002 a mihecaan 3 folad ira ko 29 a romi'adan, toya dafak laliwen ni Difang a malitengay kita a mapatay, yo mapatay cingra i ma^deng 82 ko mihecaan ningra.
S.PHON: == ʦi ɬ~ɮifaŋ == i **** a miħəʦaan ko~u kaso~ufo~uʦan ni ɬ~ɮifaŋ a maɾitəŋaj, a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦiŋra, saka i **** a miħəʦaan i, mikapo~ut ʦiira to~u ɾakəto~u~un a səɾaɾ , papiɬ~ɮiʔʦiwən no~u maɾitəŋaj ʦiŋra. o~u nian a miɬ~ɮiʔʦiwaj ħananaj a tajaɾ i, o~u tatijaŋan no~u nijaro~uʡ, matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a siɬ~ɮəmak. i **** a miħəʦaan, matajaɾ ʦi ***siŋsi a miɾo~uiŋ to~u raɬ~ɮiw no~u jin-ʦo~u-min, o~u papatajraən i fako~u ko~ura raɬ~ɮiw no~u jin-ʦo~u-min. to~uja tajni ʦiŋra i faɾa*aw a mamiɾo~uiŋ to~u raɬ~ɮiw no~u ʡamis i, ɾiʦajən niŋra ʦi pijaʡ a maɾitəŋaj, "ʦima ko~u samaraɬ~ɮiwaj namo~u o~u faɾaŋaw?" ħan niŋra. "ʦi ɬ~ɮifaŋ ko~u samaraɬ~ɮi:waj nijam." ħan ni pijaʡ a maɾitəŋaj a paʦako~u. tajra sata ʦi ***siŋsi i ɾo~umaʡ na ɬ~ɮifaŋ a maɾitəŋaj a mitəŋiɾ to~u raɬ~ɮiw naira. to~uja ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja, masaʡo~upo~u ʦa ɬ~ɮifaŋ a maɾitəm*aj i papo~utaɾ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, maħərək ʦiŋra a mipaɾamaɾ to~uja ʡo~uŋto~u niŋra a mitamako~u i, misatapaŋ to~u ʦaŋra a ro~umaɬ~ɮiw. raɬ~ɮiw sato~u ʦaŋra i, sapa sato~u ko~uja mitəŋiɾaj to~u raɬ~ɮiw naŋra a ɾafaŋ, mana makapaħ a təŋiɾən ko~u raɬ~ɮiw naŋra? sato~u ko~u ħəmək naŋra, o~uɾaħ sato~u a miɾo~uiŋ to~u raɬ~ɮiw na ɬ~ɮifaŋ a maɾitəŋaj. i **** a miħəʦaan, taħiɬ~ɮaŋən no~u fako~u a kitakit ʦiŋra a taɾafako~u a ro~umaɬ~ɮaiw. ro~umaɬ~ɮiw ʦaŋra i fako~u, "o~unini makapa:ħaj ko~u ŋiħa a tamɬ~ɮaw, nanitajwanaj, ʦi ɬ~ɮifaŋ ko~u ŋaŋan nira." sato~u ko~u pipakimaɬ~ɮaj no~u sinpo~un. itijato~u a ʡaɾo~uman ko~u mafanaʡaj to~u tajwan ħananaj a kitakit. i **** a miħəʦaan, patəko~uən na əni*ma ħananaj a ro~umaɬ~ɮiwaj ko~uja niraɬ~ɮiwan ni ɬ~ɮifaŋ a maɾitəŋaj i "rəto~u~urn-to~u inno~uʦənʦə" ʦɬ~ɮ. wata ko~u ɾiətanan no~uja ʦɬ~ɮ, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u pajso~u na əni*ma ħananaj a ro~umaɬ~ɮiwaj. nikawrira awaaj ko~u mafanaʡaj ʦima ko~uja makapaħaj a ŋiħa a tamɬ~ɮaw. taŋasa i **** a miħəʦaan i, pakaʡajawən no~u jatəɾanta o~unto~ukaj ko~uja "əto~u~urn-to~u inno~uʦənʦə" a raɬ~ɮiw a patəŋiɾ ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj, ta itija a kaɾasaso~uwaɾən no~u pakatəŋiɾaj, mana o~u niraɬ~ɮiwan ni ɬ~ɮifaŋ ko~ura raɬ~ɮiw i, nawiro~u ʦaka siŋaŋan i ʦɬ~ɮ? sato~u masaɬ~ɮak ko~u ħatiniaj a so~uwaɾ. itijato~u mafanaʡ ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj ʦi ɬ~ɮifaŋ a maɾitəŋaj, i faɾaŋaw ko~u ɾo~umaʡ niŋra, o~u ʡamis ʦiŋra. ʡ*ʡafasan na əni*ma ħananaj a ro~umaɬ~ɮiwaj ko~u raɬ~ɮiw ni ɬ~ɮifaŋ, patiko~uɾən ʦi ɬ~ɮifaŋan ko~u niɬ~ɮəmakan nira.*sato~u ko~u masaɬ~ɮakaj a so~uwaɾ. **** a miħəʦaan * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ira ko~u ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮan, to~uja ɬ~ɮafak ɾaɾiwən ni ɬ~ɮifaŋ a maɾitəŋaj kita a mapataj, jo~u mapataj ʦiŋra i maʔɬ~ɮəŋ ** ko~u miħəʦaan niŋra.
S.FORM: == Ci Difang == I 1921 a mihecaan ko kasofocan ni Difang a malitengay, a tamdaw cingra, saka i 1938 a mihecaan i, mikapot ciira to Laketun a selal , papidi^ciwen no malitengay cingra. O nian a midi^ciway hananay a tayal i, o tatiyangan no niyaro', matatodongay a sidemak. I 1978 a mihecaan, matayal ci 許常惠singsi a miloing to radiw no Yin-co-min, o papatayraen i Fako kora radiw no Yin-co-min. Toya tayni cingra i Falagaw a mamiloing to radiw no 'Amis i, licayen ningra ci Piya' a malitengay, "cima ko samaradiway namo o Falangaw?" han ningra. "Ci Difang ko samaradi:way niyam." han ni Piya' a malitengay a pacako. Tayra sata ci 許常惠singsi i loma' na Difang a malitengay a mitengil to radiw naira. Toya dadaya, masa'opo ca Difang a malitemgay i papotal no loma', maherek cingra a mipalamal toya 'ongto ningra a mitamako i, misatapang to cangra a romadiw. Radiw sato cangra i, sapa sato koya mitengilay to radiw nangra a lafang, mana makapah a tengilen ko radiw nangra? sato ko hemek nangra, olah sato a miloing to radiw na Difang a malitengay. I 1988 a mihecaan, tahidangen no Fako a kitakit cingra a talaFako a romadaiw. Romadiw cangra i Fako, "onini makapa:hay ko ngiha a tamdaw, naniTaywanay, ci Difang ko ngangan nira." sato ko pipakimaday no sinpon. Itiyato a 'aloman ko mafana'ay to Taywan hananay a kitakit. I 1993 a mihecaan, patekoen na Enigma hananay a romadiway koya niradiwan ni Difang a malitengay i "Return-To Innocence" CD. Wata ko lietanan noya CD, adihay ko payso na Enigma hananay a romadiway. Nikawrira awaay ko mafana'ay cima koya makapahay a ngiha a tamdaw. Tangasa i 1996 a mihecaan i, paka'ayawen no Yatelanta ontokay koya "eturn-To Innocence" a radiw a patengil ko 'alomanay, ta itiya a kalasasowalen no pakatengilay, mana o niradiwan ni Difang kora radiw i, nawiro caka singangan i CD? sato masadak ko hatiniay a sowal. Itiyato mafana' ko 'alomanay ci Difang a malitengay, i Falangaw ko loma' ningra, o 'Amis cingra. '〝'Afasan na Enigma hananay a romadiway ko radiw ni Difang, patikolen ci Difangan ko nidemakan nira.〞sato ko masadakay a sowal. 2002 a mihecaan 3 folad ira ko 29 a romi'adan, toya dafak laliwen ni Difang a malitengay kita a mapatay, yo mapatay cingra i ma^deng 82 ko mihecaan ningra.
S.PHON: == ʦi ɬ~ɮifaŋ == i **** a miħəʦaan ko~u kaso~ufo~uʦan ni ɬ~ɮifaŋ a maɾitəŋaj, a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦiŋra, saka i **** a miħəʦaan i, mikapo~ut ʦiira to~u ɾakəto~u~un a səɾaɾ , papiɬ~ɮiʔʦiwən no~u maɾitəŋaj ʦiŋra. o~u nian a miɬ~ɮiʔʦiwaj ħananaj a tajaɾ i, o~u tatijaŋan no~u nijaro~uʡ, matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a siɬ~ɮəmak. i **** a miħəʦaan, matajaɾ ʦi ***siŋsi a miɾo~uiŋ to~u raɬ~ɮiw no~u jin-ʦo~u-min, o~u papatajraən i fako~u ko~ura raɬ~ɮiw no~u jin-ʦo~u-min. to~uja tajni ʦiŋra i faɾa*aw a mamiɾo~uiŋ to~u raɬ~ɮiw no~u ʡamis i, ɾiʦajən niŋra ʦi pijaʡ a maɾitəŋaj, "ʦima ko~u samaraɬ~ɮiwaj namo~u o~u faɾaŋaw?" ħan niŋra. "ʦi ɬ~ɮifaŋ ko~u samaraɬ~ɮi:waj nijam." ħan ni pijaʡ a maɾitəŋaj a paʦako~u. tajra sata ʦi ***siŋsi i ɾo~umaʡ na ɬ~ɮifaŋ a maɾitəŋaj a mitəŋiɾ to~u raɬ~ɮiw naira. to~uja ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja, masaʡo~upo~u ʦa ɬ~ɮifaŋ a maɾitəm*aj i papo~utaɾ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, maħərək ʦiŋra a mipaɾamaɾ to~uja ʡo~uŋto~u niŋra a mitamako~u i, misatapaŋ to~u ʦaŋra a ro~umaɬ~ɮiw. raɬ~ɮiw sato~u ʦaŋra i, sapa sato~u ko~uja mitəŋiɾaj to~u raɬ~ɮiw naŋra a ɾafaŋ, mana makapaħ a təŋiɾən ko~u raɬ~ɮiw naŋra? sato~u ko~u ħəmək naŋra, o~uɾaħ sato~u a miɾo~uiŋ to~u raɬ~ɮiw na ɬ~ɮifaŋ a maɾitəŋaj. i **** a miħəʦaan, taħiɬ~ɮaŋən no~u fako~u a kitakit ʦiŋra a taɾafako~u a ro~umaɬ~ɮaiw. ro~umaɬ~ɮiw ʦaŋra i fako~u, "o~unini makapa:ħaj ko~u ŋiħa a tamɬ~ɮaw, nanitajwanaj, ʦi ɬ~ɮifaŋ ko~u ŋaŋan nira." sato~u ko~u pipakimaɬ~ɮaj no~u sinpo~un. itijato~u a ʡaɾo~uman ko~u mafanaʡaj to~u tajwan ħananaj a kitakit. i **** a miħəʦaan, patəko~uən na əni*ma ħananaj a ro~umaɬ~ɮiwaj ko~uja niraɬ~ɮiwan ni ɬ~ɮifaŋ a maɾitəŋaj i "rəto~u~urn-to~u inno~uʦənʦə" ʦɬ~ɮ. wata ko~u ɾiətanan no~uja ʦɬ~ɮ, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u pajso~u na əni*ma ħananaj a ro~umaɬ~ɮiwaj. nikawrira awaaj ko~u mafanaʡaj ʦima ko~uja makapaħaj a ŋiħa a tamɬ~ɮaw. taŋasa i **** a miħəʦaan i, pakaʡajawən no~u jatəɾanta o~unto~ukaj ko~uja "əto~u~urn-to~u inno~uʦənʦə" a raɬ~ɮiw a patəŋiɾ ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj, ta itija a kaɾasaso~uwaɾən no~u pakatəŋiɾaj, mana o~u niraɬ~ɮiwan ni ɬ~ɮifaŋ ko~ura raɬ~ɮiw i, nawiro~u ʦaka siŋaŋan i ʦɬ~ɮ? sato~u masaɬ~ɮak ko~u ħatiniaj a so~uwaɾ. itijato~u mafanaʡ ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj ʦi ɬ~ɮifaŋ a maɾitəŋaj, i faɾaŋaw ko~u ɾo~umaʡ niŋra, o~u ʡamis ʦiŋra. ʡ*ʡafasan na əni*ma ħananaj a ro~umaɬ~ɮiwaj ko~u raɬ~ɮiw ni ɬ~ɮifaŋ, patiko~uɾən ʦi ɬ~ɮifaŋan ko~u niɬ~ɮəmakan nira.*sato~u ko~u masaɬ~ɮakaj a so~uwaɾ. **** a miħəʦaan * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ira ko~u ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮan, to~uja ɬ~ɮafak ɾaɾiwən ni ɬ~ɮifaŋ a maɾitəŋaj kita a mapataj, jo~u mapataj ʦiŋra i maʔɬ~ɮəŋ ** ko~u miħəʦaan niŋra.
